title: baccharis sordida
intro: Baccharis sordida, also known as the bitter button or button willow, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Baccharis sordida include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Baccharis sordida can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
